mapper.select: SELECT id, relation_code, source_entity, target_entity, relation_type, join_type, join_condition, priority, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_relation WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, relation_code, source_entity, target_entity, relation_type, join_type, join_condition, priority, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_relation WHERE is_deleted = false AND (source_entity = #{entityCode} OR target_entity = #{entityCode})
